data.body:
[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

For 7 days from 9/13 (Tue), rewards dropped in Scrimmages will be tripled.
Don't miss out on this opportunity to upgrade your Exclusive Weapons!

🗓️Period: 9/12 (Mon) 19:00 – 9/19 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
